title: Canadian Public Company Spin-Offs Webinar
content:
## Canadian Public Company Spin-Offs Webinar
McCarthy Tétrault is pleased to invite you to join us for our upcoming webinar on Canadian Public Company Spin-Offs. Gain valuable insights as our experts explore the types of public company spin-offs and the tax treatment and securities/corporate law considerations of each, as well as tips and traps related to fully tax-deferred (butterfly) spin-offs.
Speakers: Raj Juneja (Toronto) , Jeff Oldewening (Toronto) , Kim Brown (Vancouver) , Jennifer F. Longhurst (Toronto) .
Note: The presentation will be given in English only. All instructions and information on how to access the webinar will be forwarded a few days before the event.
This program qualifies for up to 1.50 hours of CPD credit under the mandatory education regimes in British Columbia and Ontario.
Barreau du Québec Continuing Education: This program contains up to 1.50 hours of content. For more information regarding the declaration and recognition of educational activities, please contact the Barreau du Québec.
This program contains up to 1.5 hours of content. This learning and development activity may be eligible for CPA CPD credits. More information can be found here:
British Columbia , Alberta , Ontario , Québec .
For questions about this seminar, please contact clientevents@mccarthy.ca .
Time: 12:00 p.m. – 1:30 p.m. (ET) 10:00 a.m. – 11:30 a.m. (MT) 9:00 a.m. – 10:30 a.m. (PT)
